label: PA3_4_NEURAL_PROGENITOR
resolved_names: dp3–dp4 (PAX3+/ASCL1+ class A–B boundary dorsal progenitor)
tissue_context: spinal cord (alar plate, dorsal neural tube)
evidence: HDCA Supplementary Table 9 assigns PA3_4_NEURAL_PROGENITOR to broad_celltype CNS_SPINAL_PROGENITOR, systems NERVOUS_SYSTEM, CL term CL:4042021. Top gene signature (SOX2,PAX3,ASCL1,CXCR4,HES5,SOX9,MSX2,ZIC1,PDPN,EDNRB,IRX2,TTYH1,FZD10,POU3F2,HOXB2,HOXD4,NPPC,JAG1,LRRN1,DLL1) matches canonical dp3–dp4 (PAX3+/ASCL1+ class A–B boundary dorsal progenitor) markers documented in Lu 2015, Castellani 2013, Gray de Cristoforis 2020.
